data.content: Plan review: APPROVED. Plan correctly identifies all key files and the general approach (remove title column, extract reusable title block, render as secondary row band). One implementation note: BeatTableRow lines 181-185 and 195 use titleIdx to gate showSummary and compute colSpan — removing the title column makes titleIdx=-1, disabling the summary panel entirely. The implementer must replace the title-column anchor with a new strategy (e.g. span all columns, or anchor on the first metadata column). The 3-row-per-beat structure (metadata cells, title band, summary panel) should be explicitly planned. Otherwise the plan is complete, feasible, and respects acceptance criteria.
